text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
A decorated runner who passes on her
ambition to your trainee is called a
Veteran Umamusume.

color_text_info_list: registered as a Veteran Umamusume and chosen as a Legacy
text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Once a runner has completed her
Career, she can be registered as a
Veteran Umamusume and chosen as a
Legacy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Now then, go ahead and choose your
Legacies.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Legacies can pass on Sparks of
Inspiration, which grant your trainee
attribute boosts and skill hints, among
other benefits.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And don't worry, Legacies can inspire
new trainees as many times as you like!
